message: Implement crypto test vectors and encryption scaffolding (bd-coding_agent_session_search-jd7c)

files.patch:
@@ -70,6 +70,8 @@ dialoguer = "*"
 
 # SFTP fallback for sync when rsync is unavailable
 ssh2 = "*"
+argon2 = "0.5.3"
+hkdf = "0.12.4"
 
 # macOS keychain access (optional, for ChatGPT decryption)
 [target.'cfg(target_os = "macos")'.dependencies]
@@ -86,6 +88,7 @@ insta = { version = "*", features = ["yaml", "json"] }
 criterion = "*"
 once_cell = "*"
 serial_test = "*"
+serde_yaml = "0.9.34"
 
 [[bin]]
 name = "cass"

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+- name: "NIST SP 800-38D Test Case"
+  key: "feffe9928665731c6d6a8f9467308308feffe9928665731c6d6a8f9467308308"
+  nonce: "cafebabefacedbaddecaf888"
+  plaintext: "d9313225f88406e5a55909c5aff5269a86a7a9531534f7da2e4c303d8a318a721c3c0c95956809532fcf0e2449a6b525b16aedf5aa0de657ba637b391aafd255"
+  aad: "feedfacedeadbeeffeedfacedeadbeefabaddad2"
+  ciphertext: "522dc1f099567d07f47f37a32a84427d643a8cdcbfe5c0c97598a2bd2555d1aa8cb08e48590dbb3da7b08b1056828838c5f61e6393ba7a0abcc9f662898015ad"
+  tag: "2df7cd675b4f09163b41ebf980a7f638"
+  source: "NIST SP 800-38D"
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+- name: "RFC 9106 Section 5.3"
+  password: "password"
+  salt: "somesalt"
+  memory_kb: 64
+  iterations: 3
+  parallelism: 4
+  output_len: 32
+  expected_hash_hex: "0d640df58d78766c08c037a34a8b53c9d01ef0452d75b65eb52520e96b01e659"
+  source: "RFC 9106"

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+- name: "RFC 5869 Appendix A.1"
+  ikm: "0b0b0b0b0b0b0b0b0b0b0b0b0b0b0b0b0b0b0b0b0b0b"
+  salt: "000102030405060708090a0b0c"
+  info: "f0f1f2f3f4f5f6f7f8f9"
+  output_len: 42
+  expected_okm: "3cb25f25faacd57a90434f64d0362f2a2d2d0a90cf1a5a4c5db02d56ecc4c5bf34007208d5b887185865"
+  source: "RFC 5869"
